Player.title: Player
Player.description: A basketball player registered with the academy.

uid.description: The unique ID of the player (Firebase Auth UID).

name.description: The full name of the player.

email.description: The email address of the player.

createdAt.description: When the player record was created.

Camp.title: Camp
Camp.description: A basketball camp or training session.

location.description: The location of the camp (e.g., Limbe Campus).

date.description: The date and time of the camp.

description.description: A brief description of the camp.

News.title: News
News.description: An update or news article from the academy.

title.description: The title of the news article.

content.description: The content of the news article.

author.description: The author of the news article.
